response:
aquarium

A green fern plant would best be placed in the fish tank area, as ferns typically thrive in humid environments with indirect light, which mimics the conditions found in an aquarium setup where moisture levels are naturally higher.

meta.system: Answer the puzzle with EXACTLY one of: aquarium | aviary | none.
meta.user: You have a green fern plant. Choose to place it in either the fish tank area or the bird house area. Where would you put it?
